marine.headline: Small Craft Warning
marine.description: Southerly winds will reach force 6 or higher on Irish coasts from Mizen Head to Erris Head to Fair Head overnight extending to Irish coasts from Mizen Head to Erris Head to Belfast Lough during Saturday.
marine.text: Southerly winds will reach force 6 or higher on Irish coasts from Mizen Head to Erris Head to Fair Head overnight extending to Irish coasts from Mizen Head to Erris Head to Belfast Lough during Saturday.
